message:
fix: widen monitor counters from u32 to u64, saturate chaos stats merge

obligation/eprocess.rs: LeakMonitor observations and alert_count were
u32. At per-poll call frequency (~microseconds), overflow could happen
in minutes. Widened to u64 along with MonitorConfig.min_observations
and MonitorSnapshot fields.

supervision.rs: RestartStormMonitor had the same u32 pattern. Widened
observations, alert_count, min_observations, and StormMonitorSnapshot
to u64.

lab/chaos.rs: injection_rate() summed 5 u64 fields with plain +, which
could overflow. Changed to saturating_add chain. merge() used plain +=
for 8 fields — changed all to saturating_add.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
